mapper.sql: id, space_code, space_name, space_type, room_type, building_type, building_no, room_no, parent_id, path, level, campus_id, building_id, floor_number, capacity, current_occupancy, org_unit_id, class_id, responsible_user_id, gender_type, status, attributes, description, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, p.space_name AS parent_name, camp.space_name AS campus_name, b.space_name AS building_name, b.building_no AS parent_building_no, f.id AS floor_id, f.space_name AS floor_name, o.unit_name AS org_unit_name, cls.class_name AS class_name, cls.teacher_id AS class_teacher_id, t.real_name AS class_teacher_name, t.phone AS class_teacher_phone, u.real_name AS responsible_user_name FROM space s LEFT JOIN space p ON s.parent_id = p.id LEFT JOIN space camp ON s.campus_id = camp.id LEFT JOIN space b ON s.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN space f ON s.parent_id = f.id AND f.space_type = 'FLOOR' LEFT JOIN org_units o ON s.org_unit_id = o.id LEFT JOIN classes cls ON s.class_id = cls.id LEFT JOIN users t ON cls.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.responsible_user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0
SELECT FROM space WHERE space_code = #{spaceCode} AND deleted = 0

SELECT s.*, o.unit_name AS org_unit_name FROM space s LEFT JOIN org_units o ON s.org_unit_id = o.id WHERE s.parent_id = #{parentId} AND s.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.space_type, s.floor_number, s.space_code
SELECT FROM space WHERE space_type = 'CAMPUS' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY space_code
SELECT FROM space WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND space_type = 'FLOOR' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY floor_number
SELECT FROM space WHERE path LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY level, space_code

SELECT s.*, b.space_name AS building_name, b.building_no AS parent_building_no, f.id AS floor_id, f.space_name AS floor_name, cls.class_name AS class_name, cls.teacher_id AS class_teacher_id, t.real_name AS class_teacher_name, t.phone AS class_teacher_phone FROM space s LEFT JOIN space b ON s.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN space f ON s.parent_id = f.id AND f.space_type = 'FLOOR' LEFT JOIN classes cls ON s.class_id = cls.id LEFT JOIN users t ON cls.teacher_id = t.id WHERE s.org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId} AND s.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.building_id, s.floor_number, s.space_code
mapper.update:
UPDATE space SET org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM space WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM space WHERE FIND_IN_SET(id, REPLACE(REPLACE(#{path}, '/', ','), ',,', ',')) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY level

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM space WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND space_type = 'FLOOR' AND deleted = 0) AS totalFloors, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM space WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND space_type = 'ROOM' AND deleted = 0) AS totalRooms, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(capacity), 0) FROM space WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND space_type = 'ROOM' AND deleted = 0) AS totalCapacity, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(current_occupancy), 0) FROM space WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND space_type = 'ROOM' AND deleted = 0) AS totalOccupancy
